textByHash.c8ceabd14ccc37a6e7b22636536c798ca7f92447: What in the world is that THING?
textByHash.bc101598e14f52c7edd8a88e66ae5e24c08b96cf: I don't think I want the mad troll.
textByHash.f0ccac0e8d10a4f6b4b72f143d698f16864c4fae: Oh no, not your arm too...
textByHash.792de9f28fcde4703e2dba23e4b95ea2e2355f23: Alright, just get the arm thing onto the ship.
textByHash.1a6805ba56a1398f62d912d6a70153aef5702f39: Hello there. Would you like to travel somewhere? I can take you to Rimmington or Brimhaven for 30 coins.
textByHash.4de06dadf55fdfdaafab543beffe8abc395fe2dc: Come back when you've got 30 coins for me.
textByHash.b26f35b4e9502cf76f74c5cfdbf4ebeb49744242: Well that seems totally reasonable. Where would you like to go?
textByHash.a286c82bc66257be2403d7a90734df3613163ac8: Hello there. Would you like to travel somewhere? I can take you to Ardougne or Brimhaven for 30 coins.
textByHash.7cca19872fd983d657eeaf69752d58e54d2d8e84: Hello there. Would you like to travel somewhere? I can take you to Rimmington or Ardougne for 30 coins.
